title: Refactor trace gases
Separate covaraince computation and add it to diagnostics

body:
This pull request adds support for lazy diagnostics in ClimaAtmos, aligning with the new functionality introduced in ClimaDiagnostics.jl v0.2.13. The main changes update the way diagnostic variables are registered and documented, improving flexibility and backward compatibility.

**Diagnostics API and Documentation Improvements:**

* Refactored the `add_diagnostic_variable!` function to accept both `compute` (new, 3-argument) and `compute!` (legacy, 4-argument) keyword arguments for defining diagnostic computations, supporting backward compatibility with ClimaDiagnostics v0.2.13. The function signature and internal logic were updated to handle both forms and provide better warning messages when overwriting diagnostics. [[1]](diffhunk://#diff-0049530136103293ec2026f423f0cd61169c394e32e8c21a14a9641700c58af3L14-R21) [[2]](diffhunk://#diff-0049530136103293ec2026f423f0cd61169c394e32e8c21a14a9641700c58af3L43-R89)
* Expanded and clarified the documentation for diagnostic variable registration, including detailed descriptions for all keyword arguments and a note explaining backward compatibility with the new and old compute function signatures. [[1]](diffhunk://#diff-0049530136103293ec2026f423f0cd61169c394e32e8c21a14a9641700c58af3L31-R35) [[2]](diffhunk://#diff-0049530136103293ec2026f423f0cd61169c394e32e8c21a14a9641700c58af3L43-R89)

**Release Notes:**

* Added a release note announcing support for lazy diagnostics as introduced in ClimaDiagnostics.jl v0.2.13.
title: ft: add support for lazy diagnostics
